raw_input:
[5.0/5] Get you feet ready for flip flops! I got this for my younger cousin who kept stealing my as seen on TV version of the callus remover. She would use it to remove the hard calluses she had from wearing her soccer cleats and I was always left with dead batteries! I ordered the Calily for her because it is USB rechargeable, and even comes with a USB cord! However, it does not have the USB wall plug adapter, so you will need to get one or use the same one you use for a smartphone. She just uses the same plug adapter that she uses for her smart phone. If the rechargeable battery didn't have her sold, the 2 speed settings and inclusion of a rough and fine grain so she can get her feet in flip flop wearing condition! She called me to thank me and said it was very easy to use and works well. She was defiantly a fan of the 2 different rollers! Overall, it is working great for her and is easier to maintain as the batteries do not need replaced. [1.0/5] I'm not happy. This looks like a nice little callus remover. It comes with a charging cable and a storage bag. Being chargeable helps save money as you don't have to continuously buy batteries. It also comes with a second head. Now all that said I'm not a happy customer right now. In fact I'm disgusted. They sent me a used one. That's incredibly unsanitary. I can't even...I don't know. I'm so nauseated right now. There is a strip of skin cells around the whole thing. So, no I would not recommend this product. [5.0/5] Works well and has extras & options. Nice bag, extras and love it's rechargeable. [5.0/5] Works Great!!! This is a great callus remover,,,and it works great! I used this on my heels,,they were pretty rough and this really made a visible improvement on the first use....It comes with 2 rollers..course and fine...and has 2 speeds.....I think its great you charge this with a USB cord which is included..Also comes with a pretty silver drawstring bag for storage...This would make a very nice gift! [5.0/5] Finally home pedicure! Finally I can do a home pedicure! Very easy to handle! Comes in a cute silver bag with 2 types of rollers one is for harder callus the other for lighter callus. Rechargeable by USB. Works super fast and effective. No more blades, this really works very well right out of the box. I am really happy with this product. [5.0/5] ... my callus remover a few days ago and it great! This one is so much easier to hold ... I got my callus remover a few days ago and it great! This one is so much easier to hold than the expensive $50 one you buy at the store. This one has two speeds which is great for little feet if you kids are outdoorsy and a higher speed for the adults who have hobbit feet (my husband). It comes with a cute little bag for trips, and charging cable. The sanding stone on the remover is better than some others you see on Amazon, and I can go a while with this one before I have to go and order new refills. [5.0/5] but this is simply much better solution. It has a built in battery that ... My wife loves this callus remover. I got her a callus remover rock and she was using that, but this is simply much better solution. It has a built in battery that is rechargeable. Usually it lasts about 3-4 uses for my wife. Comes with its own USB charging cable. There are two rollers, one is fine and one is coarse. Make sure to change out appropriately. The only thing I'd like this thing to do is to make it water safe, which it isn't. My wife likes to clean her callus in the shower.

I HAD RECEIVED THE ITEM FOR FREE/AT A DISCOUNT IN EXCHANGE FOR AN UNBIASED HONEST FEEDBACK. [5.0/5] Works well works really good for a lower priced unit, i have purchased other brands which were not effective [5.0/5] I have ordered other Calily products and highly recommend them. This one did not disappoint I was so excited to order myself this electric callus remover. I have ordered other Calily products and highly recommend them. This one did not disappoint.

This little hand held callus remover is rechargeable and includes a mini USB cord, a travel bag that fits the remover perfectly, and an extra roller. It was surprisingly already charged so I was able to use it immediately. It has two speeds by pushing the button once for low, twice for high and third for off. It is very simple to use, and does not hurt at all. I am amazed at how quiet it is. All around, this is a great product and I highly recommend it. [5.0/5] After years of abuse his feet need some serious work and I figured this would be great to finally tackle his calluses I got this to help manage my husbands dry feet. After years of abuse his feet need some serious work and I figured this would be great to finally tackle his calluses. It worked great. I love the fact that it is rechargeable (and comes with the cord that plugs into a USB) there is nothing more annoying than batteries dying and your tools loosing their power. This seemed to stay strong through all the abuse. I could literally see the skin flaking off it looked like smoke- it was gross. It made a huge difference and even the next day he was able to feel a difference in his feet. We have a long way to go to get them to an "acceptable" level but this is making huge improvements.
The only thing I wish it had was some way to kind of trap the skin flakes so I didn't feel like I was covered in it but really that isn't the end of the world. It is a huge bonus to see it and know that it is working.
I am excited to see what we can get his feet to look like with this. So far so good [5.0/5] I love this Callus Remover [[VIDEOID:1da6497fdd5253aa724883767877e504]] I love this Callus Remover. It has smoothed out my feet a great deal all ready. I have only used it twice. It hasn't completely removed them yet but I'm still impressed. I wasn't expecting a miracle anyway. It comes with a coarse or a fine dermabrasion roller. It has 2 speeds, low and high. It's small and compact and easy to use. No need for batteries, just turn on and rub on calluses. It came in a timely manner and packaged neatly. [2.0/5] Two Stars Motor bogs down under pressure needs stronger motor [5.0/5] Easy to use I have used it on the bottom of both feet for plantar warts, and it helped a lot. If it runs down, I just plug the cord into the necessary outlets to get it
fully charged. Easy to use, and efficient!

A very good tool. [5.0/5] Time to Say Goodbye to Dry Heels!!! I have used many different ways to smooth out my rough heels including a Dremel and this by far the easiest way. I will never have to use pumice stones or those handheld micro plane files that look like cheese graters again. This does all the work for me. To use it, you just gently place the head against your rough skin and it begins to smooth them out leaving behind a fine powder of dry dead skin.

I only used it for 30 seconds on both heels on my first try, to gauge the length of time to use it and its effect. It was really all I needed. My heels felt a tad warm from the friction. Surprisingly, my heels were smoother already. It is better to do a little at a time so you don't do any damage. I was a bit skeptical about this product but was pleasantly surprised. It pops right out of the packaging and after reading the directions it is ready to use. The dead skin removal is painless, and not as messy as I thought it would be. It also performed well on the rougher patches, I did not have to apply much pressure at all It left my skin smooth but not raw (this resolved most of my trepidation). This product does what it advertises and is a simple easy to use tool. I would highly recommend it. But best of all I will be saving a lot on pedicures. Now that is something to smile about!! [5.0/5] The Calily Electric Callus Removed is awesome. I was really excited to try it out [[VIDEOID:43ab53e7d4f49a52e5ddf66736d1ff75]] The Calily Electric Callus Removed is awesome. I was really excited to try it out. I really liked how easy it was to use. Power button of course powers it on of course, then if you push it again it turns to night. Its nice that if comes with both the course and fine buffer, so you can really get rid of those callus's. There is side button that releases the buffer without a problem. You can hold it with one hand, and simple to clean. I loved that it came with a little pull bag to store it in. Only thing I wish it had as a regular power cord, this however doesn't hinder my opinion of the product.
All around great product. [5.0/5] It's nice and small and fits perfectly in my hand It's nice and small and fits perfectly in my hand, it's comfortable to hold while filing down my husbands Sasquatch feet. He likes to walk barefoot 99% of the time while he's home, which causes real thick foot calluses. As the woman of the house, I find it my duty to nit pick and groom him, because if I don't, who will? It does a great job filing through his calluses, with minimal effort. It comes with a spare sander blade for me as well so we don't mix up the skin cells (yuck) and comes with batteries, which saved me a trip to the store. Would definitely recommend to anyone.

To use it, you just gently place the head against your rough skin and it begins to smooth them out leaving behind a fine powder of dry dead skin.

I only used it for 30 seconds on both heels on my first try, to gauge the length of time to use it and its effect. It was really all I needed. My heels felt a tad warm from the friction. Surprisingly, my heels were smoother already. It is better to do a little at a time so you don't do any damage. I was a bit skeptical about this product but was pleasantly surprised. It pops right out of the packaging and after reading the directions it is ready to use. The dead skin removal is painless, and not as messy as I thought it would be. It also performed well on the rougher patches, I did not have to apply much pressure at all It left my skin smooth but not raw (this resolved most of my trepidation). This product does what it advertises and is a simple easy to use tool. I would highly recommend it. But best of all I will be saving a lot on pedicures. Now that is something to smile about!! Only thing I wish it had as a regular power cord, this however doesn't hinder my opinion of the product.
All around great product. He likes to walk barefoot 99% of the time while he's home, which causes real thick foot calluses. As the woman of the house, I find it my duty to nit pick and groom him, because if I don't, who will? response:
Most love product. USB rechargeable, no battery hassle. Come with USB cord, two rollers (coarse and fine), two speeds, silver drawstring bag. Easy hold, easy use, quiet. Work good on tough calluses, see results fast. Good for travel. Better than pumice stone, cheese grater file, manual rock.

Bad: one customer get used unit, skin cells on it, very disgusting, unsanitary. One say motor bog down under pressure, need stronger motor. No wall plug adapter included, need own. Not waterproof, no skin trap for flakes.

Most customers happy, recommend product.
